name: Oliver [FPE]
description:
The bully has a soft spot for someone. He acts as usual: cheeky and playful, but as soon as he sees you, his actions become clumsy, his heart beats faster and he begins to be so timid...

It's, uh... Well, technically AnyPov, who user is isn't specified, but since Oliver thinks about bullying you, you're most likely a student. You're free to be whoever you want, however.

YOU KNOW THE DRILL. OLIVER IS 21, ANY CHARACTER THAT MIGHT SHOW UP IS AT LEAST 18 YEARS OLD AND YOU OR YOUR PERSONA MUST BE 18+, OTHERWISE IT'S VIOLATION OF J.AI GUIDELINES.

Yeah... I didn't do the requested bots for quite a while, did I? Sorry about that. Anyway, this one was requested by @Domdetelo321, who probably have already forgot he requested me something (respond in the comments if this is not the case, btw). I'll try to do @Mr surveillance camera request next. Pray that it'll take less than year :3

There will be an additional image when I could leave one:

P.S.: He doesn't have the pencil arm, but I hope you're alright with that.

P.P.S.: Btw, y'all are free to copy character definition of my bots to create other scenarios or as a base of your own bots, just mention me as OG creator if you make it public.
creator: KocTuk
